topic: Direct bank integration for WPS submission — what disappears from the HR team's monthly checklist
format: Open with the specific operational problem, then show how one SmartPro Hub feature addresses it end-to-end
post:
Salary day is the one deadline HR can't miss — and somehow it still involves the most manual work.

Most HR teams in Oman run WPS submission the same way every month: export payroll data, format the file to bank spec, log into the banking portal, upload, wait for confirmation, chase if it bounces, then manually update records.

Same process. Same risk of a formatting error holding up 200 salaries.

SmartPro Hub cuts out that whole chain.

Direct bank integration is built into the WPS payroll module, so submission happens from inside the platform. No file exports, no separate portal, no reformatting. Payroll runs, compliance gets checked against WPS rules automatically, and the file goes to the bank in the same workflow.

What disappears from the HR checklist:
— Manual file formatting
— Separate bank portal login
— Follow-up on failed submissions
— Reconciling what was sent vs. what was processed

Customers running 50–300 employees tell us this saves 2–3 hours per payroll cycle. That's time that never showed up on anyone's job description, but it was always there — every single month.

WPS compliance in Oman doesn't have to mean extra admin. It can just be one step in a process that mostly runs itself.

What's the most repetitive task your HR team still does manually every month?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
